d d!d"d#d$d%d&d'd(d)d*d+d,d-
d.d/d
d0d0d1d2d3d3d3d4d4d5d5d6d7d8d
d9d:d;d<d=d>d?d?d?d
)Bz[
Simplified Chinese language mappings for language-dependent features of
reStructuredText.

caution

danger

mathZ

include

unicode
date

default-role
title

footerz
target-notes
restructuredtext-test-directive)+u
code (translation required)u
z!line-block (translation required)z%parsed-literal (translation required)u
z!pull-quote (translation required)u
math (translation required)u
z#target-notes (translation required)r

H/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/zh_cn.py
